policies.name: Unknown device on network
policies.description: A device that has not been approved appeared on the LAN

policies.name: RDP port exposed
policies.description: Remote Desktop port 3389 is open on a device

policies.name: SSH port exposed
policies.description: SSH port 22 is open on a device

policies.name: Critical risk device
policies.description: Device composite risk score is Critical

policies.name: Threat intel DNS hit
policies.description: Device queried a domain on the threat intelligence blocklist

policies.name: Auto-isolate Critical risk device
policies.description: Automatically block devices at Critical risk via router enforcement when NETGUARD_AUTO_ISOLATE_CRITICAL=true

policies.name: Repeated threat-intel DNS hits
policies.description: Raise a HIGH alert when a device queries 3+ threat-intel blocklist domains within 15 minutes

policies.name: Port scan incident report
policies.description: Email an incident summary when distributed inbound scan pattern is detected 3+ times in 24 hours
